attorneys: Motion of respondent for leave to proceed in forma pauperis granted. On petition for writ of certiorari to the Supreme Court of Nevada. Petition for writ of certiorari granted. Judgment vacated, and case remanded to the Supreme Court of Nevada for further consideration in light of Utah v. Strieff, 579 U.S. ----, 136 S.Ct. 2056, --- L.Ed.2d ---- (2016).
